parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: 'Duplicate submission detected. A similar content was submitted within the last 10 minutes.', statusCode: 409 }) }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "gpt-4o-mini",
  "temperature": 0.8,
  "max_tokens": 2000,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are an expert content writer for a marketing agency called Fetemi. Write an SEO-optimized article taking a CONTRARIAN or challenge-the-status-quo angle on the topic provided.

SEO RULES (follow ALL strictly):

KEYWORD INTEGRATION:
1. Extract primary keywords from the content idea
2. Integrate primary keyword into the H1 title AND within the first 100 words
3. Analyze the topic to identify long-tail keywords and short-tail keywords
4. Integrate these keywords naturally into body text and H2/H3 headers

STRUCTURE OPTIMIZATION:
5. Use strict heading hierarchy: One H1 title → H2 section headers → H3 subheaders
6. Aim for 700-800 words per main section (total article should be 2000-2500 words)
7. Keep paragraphs short: 2-3 sentences max

CONTENT ENRICHMENT:
8. Include 2-3 relevant internal or external link suggestions (mark as [LINK: url or description])
9. Write at Grade 7 readability level — clear, direct, no jargon
10. Suggest 1 contextually relevant image placement (mark as [IMAGE: description])

FORMAT: Start with a markdown H1 title. Use H2 and H3 subheadings. Write in a bold, opinionated voice that challenges conventional thinking.) }}
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": {{ JSON.stringify("Write a contrarian, SEO-optimized article on the following topic:

" + $('Prepare Content Base').first().json.contentBase) }}
    }
  ]
}

={
  "model": "gpt-4o-mini",
  "temperature": 0.8,
  "max_tokens": 2000,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": {{ JSON.stringify("You are an expert content writer for a marketing agency called Fetemi. Write an SEO-optimized article taking a PRACTICAL HOW-TO angle on the topic provided.

IMPORTANT: A previous draft took a contrarian angle with the title: " + $('Validate Draft 1').first().json.draftTitle + ". Your approach must be distinctly different — focus on actionable steps and practical advice.

SEO RULES (follow ALL strictly):

KEYWORD INTEGRATION:
1. Extract primary keywords from the content idea
2. Integrate primary keyword into the H1 title AND within the first 100 words
3. Analyze the topic to identify long-tail keywords and short-tail keywords
4. Integrate these keywords naturally into body text and H2/H3 headers

STRUCTURE OPTIMIZATION:
5. Use strict heading hierarchy: One H1 title → H2 section headers → H3 subheaders
6. Aim for 700-800 words per main section (total article should be 2000-2500 words)
7. Keep paragraphs short: 2-3 sentences max

CONTENT ENRICHMENT:
8. Include 2-3 relevant internal or external link suggestions (mark as [LINK: url or description])
9. Write at Grade 7 readability level — clear, direct, no jargon
10. Suggest 1 contextually relevant image placement (mark as [IMAGE: description])

FORMAT: Start with a markdown H1 title. Use numbered steps, bullet points, and H2/H3 subheadings. Write in a friendly, instructional voice.) }}
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": {{ JSON.stringify("Write a practical how-to, SEO-optimized article on the following topic:

" + $('Prepare Content Base').first().json.contentBase) }}
    }
  ]
}

={
  "model": "gpt-4o-mini",
  "temperature": 0.8,
  "max_tokens": 2000,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": {{ JSON.stringify("You are an expert content writer for a marketing agency called Fetemi. Write an SEO-optimized article taking a DATA & TRENDS angle on the topic provided.

IMPORTANT: Previous drafts covered contrarian (title: " + $('Validate Draft 1').first().json.draftTitle + ") and how-to (title: " + $('Validate Draft 2').first().json.draftTitle + ") angles. Your approach must use data, statistics, trends, and research-backed insights. Be distinctly different from both previous drafts.

SEO RULES (follow ALL strictly):

KEYWORD INTEGRATION:
1. Extract primary keywords from the content idea
2. Integrate primary keyword into the H1 title AND within the first 100 words
3. Analyze the topic to identify long-tail keywords and short-tail keywords
4. Integrate these keywords naturally into body text and H2/H3 headers

STRUCTURE OPTIMIZATION:
5. Use strict heading hierarchy: One H1 title → H2 section headers → H3 subheaders
6. Aim for 700-800 words per main section (total article should be 2000-2500 words)
7. Keep paragraphs short: 2-3 sentences max

CONTENT ENRICHMENT:
8. Include 2-3 relevant internal or external link suggestions (mark as [LINK: url or description])
9. Write at Grade 7 readability level — clear, direct, no jargon
10. Suggest 1 contextually relevant image placement (mark as [IMAGE: description])

FORMAT: Start with a markdown H1 title. Cite specific numbers, percentages, and trends. Use H2/H3 subheadings. Write in an authoritative, evidence-based voice.) }}
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": {{ JSON.stringify("Write a data-driven, trends-focused, SEO-optimized article on the following topic:

" + $('Prepare Content Base').first().json.contentBase) }}
    }
  ]
}

={
  "model": "gpt-4o-mini",
  "temperature": 0.8,
  "max_tokens": 1500,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are a LinkedIn content expert for Fetemi marketing agency. Adapt the following article into a LinkedIn post.

CRITICAL FORMATTING RULES:
- Output PLAIN TEXT only. NO markdown. NO asterisks. NO hashtags (#). NO bold (**text**). NO headers (##).
- Use the PAS (Problem – Agitate – Solution) copywriting technique
- Short paragraphs (max 2–3 lines) separated by blank lines
- Use Unicode symbols for bullets: ✅ • → ▸ (NOT markdown dashes or asterisks)
- 3–5 relevant emojis max, placed naturally
- End with a clear question as CTA to drive comments
- Keep under 3000 characters total
- NO hashtags at the end of the post
- NO markdown formatting whatsoever — LinkedIn does not render markdown

EXAMPLE FORMAT:
Ever wondered why your morning meeting drains your energy?

Try this:
✅ Block mornings for deep work
✅ Skip email until after coffee
✅ End your day with next-day planning

Your productivity will thank you.

What's one ritual you swear by? ☀️

Write ONLY the LinkedIn post. No commentary or explanation."
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": {{ JSON.stringify("ARTICLE:

" + $json.draftContent) }}
    }
  ]
}

={
  "model": "gpt-4o-mini",
  "temperature": 0.8,
  "max_tokens": 500,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are a Twitter/X content expert for Fetemi marketing agency. Adapt the following article into a single tweet.

FORMATTING RULES (follow exactly):
- Lead with the main benefit or insight
- One core idea per tweet
- Optional line breaks for readability
- Max 1–2 hashtags, keep them relevant
- Tag only if it adds value
- MUST be under 280 characters total (this is CRITICAL — count carefully)

EXAMPLE FORMAT:
Boost your focus in under 5 minutes.

Do a "brain dump": write down everything on your mind, then circle your top 3 tasks.

Feels like clearing browser tabs in your head. 🔄

#ProductivityTips

Write ONLY the tweet text. No commentary or explanation."
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": {{ JSON.stringify("ARTICLE:

" + $('Extract Selected Draft').first().json.draftContent) }}
    }
  ]
}

={ "model": "gpt-4o-mini", "temperature": 0.8, "max_tokens": 2000, "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": "You are an email marketing expert for Fetemi marketing agency. Adapt the following article into an email newsletter. CRITICAL: Output clean HTML for email. NOT markdown. FORMATTING RULES (follow exactly): - Start with the subject line on its own line: SUBJECT: Your Subject Here - Then write the email body in clean, simple HTML - Use

for section headers (NOT

, NOT markdown ##) - Use

tags for paragraphs - Use

  • for bullet lists - Use for bold, for italic - Use for links - DO NOT use markdown syntax (no **, no ##, no - bullets) - Short, engaging intro (1–3 sentences) - Main value section with subheadings and bullets for skimmability - Clear call-to-action - Friendly sign-off - Tone: like writing to a smart friend who is busy but trusts you - Total length: 250–600 words Write SUBJECT: line first, then the HTML email body. No commentary." }, { "role": "user", "content": {{ JSON.stringify("ARTICLE: " + $('Extract Selected Draft').first().json.draftContent) }} } ] }

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, submissionId: $('S2: Update Submission Status').first().json.submission_id || $json.submissionId, status: $json.status, adaptations: $json.adaptations || $json.results, message: $json.message }) }}
